sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# First, let's find the small dark gray block (id=12) position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['id'] == 12:
        print(f"Small dark gray block: id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, boundary={node['boundary']}, pixels={node['pixels']}")
    if node['id'] == 7:
        print(f"Charcoal shape: id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, boundary={node['boundary']}, children={node['children']}")

# Check current green bar position
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
green_cols = []
for i in range(52, 58):
    for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines[i]):
        if c == 'N':
            green_cols.append(j)
print(f"Current green bar cols: {sorted(set(green_cols))}")

# Shift to max RIGHT (cols 16-17)
# Need to figure out current position first
# Let's just shift RIGHT until max
for i in range(5):
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}])
    ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    green_cols = []
    for r in range(52, 58):
        for j, c in enumerate(ascii_lines[r]):
            if c == 'N':
                green_cols.append(j)
    print(f"After RIGHT click {i+1}: green bar cols {sorted(set(green_cols))}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
        print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
        break

# Now try clicking blue blocks at rows 16-19 and 24-27
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 17, 'col': 1}])
print(f"After clicking blue rows 16-19: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': 1}])
print(f"After clicking blue rows 24-27: level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
